questions.explanation: J.J. Thomson discovered the electron in 1897 through his cathode ray tube experiments.
Protons are positively charged particles found in the nucleus of an atom. Their charge is +1.6 × 10⁻¹⁹ C.

questions.correctAnswer: Atoms of same element with same atomic number but different mass numbers.
questions.explanation: Isotopes have same number of protons but different number of neutrons. Example: Carbon-12 and Carbon-14.

questions.text: The maximum number of electrons in L shell is ________.
questions.explanation: Maximum electrons in a shell = 2n². For L shell (n=2): 2(2)² = 8 electrons.
